notes: 2026 standard direct rate. Tax-inclusive for Villa La Percha; no separate guest tax line is added on DirectStay. Maintains roughly 20–23% book-direct savings versus updated Airbnb/VRBO comparison records for spring.
2026 summer peak direct rate. Ends Sep 8 after updated Airbnb/VRBO pricing showed the OTA shoulder stepdown beginning around Sep 8–12; keeps direct savings roughly in the 20–22% range during summer.

2026 shoulder-season direct rate through Dec 18. Holiday premium starts Dec 19, where Airbnb/VRBO pricing first reaches true Christmas-week levels; this keeps mid-December mixed stays from losing the book-direct discount.

2026 Christmas/New Year direct rate per Jaimal direction on 2026-05-07. Starts Dec 19 when OTA pricing reaches true Christmas-week levels; intentionally more generous than Airbnb/VRBO peak holiday pricing without giving away the prior $1,700/night level.

2027 January-April peak-season direct rate per Jaimal direction on 2026-05-08. Inferred from Elite Destination Homes recovered ladder ($1,550 low season, $1,695 summer, $2,950 Christmas) and Turks & Caicos winter high-season demand; tax-inclusive with 7-night minimum.

2027 spring-break/Easter peak direct rate per Jaimal direction on 2026-05-08. Covers the highest-demand school-break and Easter-adjacent window; below Christmas/New Year peak but above winter base. Tax-inclusive with 7-night minimum.

2027 late peak-season direct rate per Jaimal direction on 2026-05-08. Keeps April above shoulder/low-season pricing while stepping down after Easter/spring-break demand. Tax-inclusive with 7-night minimum.
2027 May direct shoulder rate, returning to the standard direct rate after January-April peak season. Tax-inclusive; 5-night minimum unless owner approval requires otherwise.
